fusing a genetically encoded proximity-labeling (PL) enzyme to a protein or a localization signal peptide
fused to a PL enzyme... at either the N or C terminus and expressed under the bait protein's native promoter at the endogenous level.
In the presence of applied biotin, this engineered promiscuous biotin ligase converts biotin...
less than 50 μM of biotin treatment are strongly recommended... shorter time of biotin treatment (≤ 1 h) is preferred... longer biotin treatment (up to several hours) may be needed
These biotinylated proteins can then be captured by streptavidin beads
high-affinity streptavidin beads (Kd=10^-14 mol/L) under very harsh conditions
most labs perform on-head digestions for elution in which the biotinylated proteins are eluted from the beads using a short (~3-h) trypsin digestion
short (~3-h) trypsin digestion, followed by overnight full digestion
identified and quantified by mass spectrometry
all quantification data should be acquired on high-resolution/high-accuracy instruments.
using the publicly available software Maxquant/Perseus for data search and statistical analysis
